<@606955103601295381> I was wondering why we have slowmode now and why you're accusing Lazy Sun of being a pedo and accusing the others of defending the accused pedo.

So I scrolled all the way up to the message you replied to, and scrolled all the way up even more to read what led to that, and then scrolled all the way down again to see the rest of the conversation.

Would you like to know what I found, so that you can refresh your mind on what transpired?

Let's start with Lazy Sun saying "I love you Spooky". Lazy Sun and Spooky are obviously friends who are showing affection to each other, something that you clearly aren't gaining from the rest of the people here.

Next, when Lazy Sun said "let's get you to bed unc", you immediately jumped to the conclusion that she's admitting to being a pedo. How you managed to jump to completely unrelated conclusions seem to be a special skill of yours, something that is further highlighted in your next messages.

You also mentioned that they were discussing nsfw stuff in the chat. Perhaps I'm just illiterate and that's why I didn't see any mention of nsfw things in chat even after reading through all of that. But I believe I'm not illiterate, and so are the rest of the people here, we can read and we definitely did not read any mentions of "sex and pedophilia".

Moving on, you further accused everyone of harassing you and making false accusations and personal attacks. I will not comment on their dislike of you but pray tell, good sir, were you not the first one to sling mud at Lazy Sun and the rest of the others by accusing them flirting with minors and of pedophilia? Was this not an act of false accusation, harassment, and slander?

With all that said, you are indeed disruptive, unpleasant, and straight up a liar.

And if I get time out or banned for saying this, it was well worth it. I want to say more but you're not worth more than the time I've spent on this. Bye loser!

I’m sure you’re all aware of the fact that Anni Raid is coming next patch. Let me be clear: we are a highly competitive game, and as such, we do not tolerate anyone not having OE Kath or +12 Pollux. Upon joining the game, each of you was expected to perform efficiently in every anni raid, no matter what, by actively doing 17 hits everyday. Therefore, the community has decided to conduct random inspections during anni and after anni to check whether any Followers have OE Kath or +12 Pollux for the anni raid. If it’s discovered that if they don't have at least OE Kath or +12 Pollux, the follower in question will be flagged for immediate unfollow and referred to the community blacklist. We expect everyone’s full cooperation this anni and going forward. Thank you, and good luck to all.

embeds.title: Somehow explaining the Discord false bans and support issues
embeds.description: Hi and welcome to this wannabe article about what in the world is going on with Discord Support and Discord false bans situation right now!Now, I am not a professional at such things, but I'll try ...

content: yep, people are saying this is an easy ban for the automated system
this will get you pretty much dead locked

Oh no, that won't happen. If one person in a server breaking ToS could get the rest of the banned then those 500k large servers would be cooked lol Fortunately discord doesn't seem to operate in a one down the rest down with them manner
The individuals using 3rd party though yeah thoughts and prayers
if the server as a whole is focused on bad stuff then maybe... if you stay in it
tbf thats on you more so
but discord doesnt usually target those unless theres like
